UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Inc. is present. Represented by Jack Sumski.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nyiema Bayfield is present.
Attorney Trenton Montgomery representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The signed agreement and judgment filed.
The trial date of MAY-07-2012 is vacated.
